title: Wolf Knight returns linked Were summon when invalidated

card.rawText: During your turn, you may summon a creature with "Were" in its name from your hand as a Limited Summon. Return them to your hand if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Wolf Knight returns linked Were summon when invalidated
plan.summary: If Wolf Knight leaves, changes control, or the effect is negated, verify linked Were Limited Summon returns to hand.
